text: Welcome ,  this is where Anthony Hicks keeps truck stop notes, the audiobook queue, and gift ideas for Janelle.
Quick links
Open the Truck Stops database
Stops I use heading north on I-65 from Birmingham toward Nashville.
Stops by exit
Exit 318 Pilot ,  clean showers, easy big-rig parking, decent diner next door
Confirm overnight parking still free at Exit 340 Love's
Stops heading east on I-20 from Birmingham toward Atlanta.
Stops by exit
Exit 168 Love's ,  lots of truck parking, good fuel pricing, Subway inside
Check whether Exit 210 Pilot reopened the showers
Stops on I-75 between Atlanta and Chattanooga.
Stops by exit
Exit 296 Pilot ,  busy, get there before 7pm for parking; showers usually quick
Find a backup stop near Exit 320 for late arrivals
